name: Siri Shortcuts MCP Server
description: This MCP server provides access to Siri shortcuts functionality via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It allows listing, opening, and running shortcuts from the macOS Shortcuts app.

tools.name: list_shortcuts
tools.description: Lists all available Siri shortcuts on the system

tools.name: open_shortcut
tools.description: Opens a shortcut in the Shortcuts app

tools.name: run_shortcut
tools.description: Runs a shortcut with optional input
